calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-25-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Stan Bair, Clerk: Felicia Green, Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Raymond Lee is present.
Attorney, Joseph A. Sacramento appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant, H. Craig Hudson (aka Craig Hudson) is present.
Attorney, Yue (Julie) Zhu representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 355 1st Street, Unit S1208, San Francisco, 94105.

This case settled, the trial date of Jun-29-2009 is vacated.
